title: Refreshed Local Studio Server Architecture
summary: Updated the Local Studio server architecture doc so it describes the current app-server-owned route and API model instead of presenting most consolidation work as future or possible.
effect: The architecture doc now reflects that Docs, analytics, catalogue, audits, and migrated Studio route shells normally run through the local Studio app server, with remaining work focused on route cleanup, projection contracts, public/local boundaries, and the optional Audit Service wrapper decision.
